text.title: nginx-reverse-proxy Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for nginx-reverse-proxy as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Setting Content-Security-Policy in the global snippet
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: CSP requires per-site values (each app has different allowed sources). A global CSP either blocks functionality or is too permissive to matter.
